description: Displays a news article publication date using a semantic time element with a machine-readable datetime attribute.
notes: The component is a span.news-date wrapping a time element. The datetime attribute holds the ISO 8601 machine-readable date, while the visible text is a human-readable formatted date. Both vary across pages and must be props. The .news-teaser .news-date selector is covered as this atom appears inside news teaser molecules.
